channel.title: The Beginner's Guide to Pro Cycling
channel.description:
Cycling is a beautiful sport. It's also a nightmare for new fans to get into – a mess of jargon, history, and tactics, spread across a long and confusing calendar.
We are here to help. Journalism professor (and new cycling fan) Holly Johnson has questions, and Iain Treloar has answers (sometimes). Join us for the beginners' guide to pro cycling, as we break down what you need to know about the sport, and why.
Escape Collective is member-funded. If you like this podcast please consider supporting us by becoming a member: https://escapecollective.com/member/

image.title: The Beginner's Guide to Pro Cycling

channel.itunes:author: Escape Collective
channel.itunes:summary:
Cycling is a beautiful sport. It's also a nightmare for new fans to get into – a mess of jargon, history, and tactics, spread across a long and confusing calendar.
We are here to help. Journalism professor (and new cycling fan) Holly Johnson has questions, and Iain Treloar has answers (sometimes). Join us for the beginners' guide to pro cycling, as we break down what you need to know about the sport, and why.
Escape Collective is member-funded. If you like this podcast please consider supporting us by becoming a member: https://escapecollective.com/member/
channel.itunes:subtitle: Cycling is a beautiful sport.
channel.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: Newbie newbie new: Or, how do you know if you're a cycling fandom beginner?
item.itunes:title: Newbie newbie new: Or, how do you know if you're a cycling fandom beginner?
item.description: How can cycling be more welcoming to newcomers? How do you know if you are one? Does it matter? Holly takes the reins as she and Iain assess the landscape for fresh fans of the sport, figure out the best way to open the tent for everyone, and come up with a handy tool to Find Your Own Pro Cyclist Name.
item.content:encoded: How can cycling be more welcoming to newcomers? How do you know if you are one? Does it matter? Holly takes the reins as she and Iain assess the landscape for fresh fans of the sport, figure out the best way to open the tent for everyone, and come up with a handy tool to Find Your Own Pro Cyclist Name.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: How can cycling be more welcoming to newcomers? How do you know if you are one? Does it matter? Holly takes the reins as she and Iain assess the landscape for fresh fans of the sport, figure out the best way to open the tent for everyone, and come up with a handy tool to Find Your Own Pro Cyclist Name.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: What WorldTour races are actually worth your time?
item.itunes:title: What WorldTour races are actually worth your time?
item.description: So you've watched the Tour de France – what next? With a continent-hopping WorldTour calendar, running from January to October, there's a whole lot to wrap your head around. Holly and Iain run through the races that are worth getting up early (or staying up late) for, the ones that help shape the season's narrative, and the ones that are worth skipping.
item.content:encoded: So you've watched the Tour de France – what next? With a continent-hopping WorldTour calendar, running from January to October, there's a whole lot to wrap your head around. Holly and Iain run through the races that are worth getting up early (or staying up late) for, the ones that help shape the season's narrative, and the ones that are worth skipping.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: So you've watched the Tour de France – what next? With a continent-hopping WorldTour calendar, running from January to October, there's a whole lot to wrap your head around. Holly and Iain run through the races that are worth getting up early (or staying up late) for, the ones that help shape the season's narrative, and the ones that are worth skipping.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: The Tour de France edition
item.itunes:title: The Tour de France edition
item.description: Ever have a question about the Tour de France? We've got you covered.
item.content:encoded: Ever have a question about the Tour de France? We've got you covered.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: Ever have a question about the Tour de France? We've got you covered.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: The beginner's guide to pro cycling
item.itunes:title: The beginner's guide to pro cycling
item.description: Cycling's a beautiful sport. It's also a nightmare for new fans to get into – a mess of jargon, history, and tactics. Journalism professor (and new cycling fan) Holly Johnson has questions, and together with Iain Treloar, is on a mission to decipher pro cycling. In the first episode of this Rabbit Holes podcast offshoot: a chat with EF Education-Easypost CEO Jonathan Vaughters about how teams work.
item.content:encoded: Cycling's a beautiful sport. It's also a nightmare for new fans to get into – a mess of jargon, history, and tactics. Journalism professor (and new cycling fan) Holly Johnson has questions, and together with Iain Treloar, is on a mission to decipher pro cycling. In the first episode of this Rabbit Holes podcast offshoot: a chat with EF Education-Easypost CEO Jonathan Vaughters about how teams work.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: Cycling's a beautiful sport. It's also a nightmare for new fans to get into – a mess of jargon, history, and tactics. Journalism professor (and new cycling fan) Holly Johnson has questions, and together with Iain Treloar, is on a mission to decipher pro cycling. In the first episode of this Rabbit Holes podcast offshoot: a chat with EF Education-Easypost CEO Jonathan Vaughters about how teams work.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: S3E8: Take a Bow
item.itunes:title: S3E8: Take a Bow
item.description: Caley Fretz, Jonny Long, and Kit Nicholson discuss the final episode of Unchained, focusing on the finale of the 2024 Tour de France.
item.content:encoded: Caley Fretz, Jonny Long, and Kit Nicholson discuss the final episode of Unchained, focusing on the finale of the 2024 Tour de France.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: Caley Fretz, Jonny Long, and Kit Nicholson discuss the final episode of Unchained, focusing on the finale of the 2024 Tour de France.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: S3E7: King of the Mountain
item.itunes:title: S3E7: King of the Mountain
item.description: Caley Fretz, Jonny Long, Dane Cash, and Intern Nick tackle the penultimate episode of Tour de France: Unchained, centering on the hopes of Richard Carapaz and other stagehunters trying to break free of the firm grip that UAE has on the race.
item.content:encoded: Caley Fretz, Jonny Long, Dane Cash, and Intern Nick tackle the penultimate episode of Tour de France: Unchained, centering on the hopes of Richard Carapaz and other stagehunters trying to break free of the firm grip that UAE has on the race.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: Caley Fretz, Jonny Long, Dane Cash, and Intern Nick tackle the penultimate episode of Tour de France: Unchained, centering on the hopes of Richard Carapaz and other stagehunters trying to break free of the firm grip that UAE has on the race.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: S3E6: History Makers
item.itunes:title: S3E6: History Makers
item.description: Caley Fretz, Jonny Long, Dane Cash, and Intern Nick talk Unchained S3E6, which focuses on the history-making achievements of Biniam Girmay and Mark Cavendish.
item.content:encoded: Caley Fretz, Jonny Long, Dane Cash, and Intern Nick talk Unchained S3E6, which focuses on the history-making achievements of Biniam Girmay and Mark Cavendish.

item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: S3E5: The Comeback
item.itunes:title: S3E5: The Comeback
item.description: Caley Fretz, Kit Nicholson, and Dane Cash dive into the fifth episode of season three, which takes a closer look at Jonas Vingegaard's journey back to racing after the crash that derailed the first half of his season.
item.content:encoded: Caley Fretz, Kit Nicholson, and Dane Cash dive into the fifth episode of season three, which takes a closer look at Jonas Vingegaard's journey back to racing after the crash that derailed the first half of his season.
item.author: Escape Collective

item.itunes:summary: Caley Fretz, Kit Nicholson, and Dane Cash dive into the fifth episode of season three, which takes a closer look at Jonas Vingegaard's journey back to racing after the crash that derailed the first half of his season.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: S3E4: Road to Hell
item.itunes:title: S3E4: Road to Hell
item.description: Caley Fretz, Jonny Long, and Kit Nicholson talk Unchained S3E4, which centers on the gravel stage of the 2024 Tour and the twin battles for stage honors and for GC position.
item.content:encoded: Caley Fretz, Jonny Long, and Kit Nicholson talk Unchained S3E4, which centers on the gravel stage of the 2024 Tour and the twin battles for stage honors and for GC position.

item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: S3E3 Adapt or Die
item.itunes:title: S3E3 Adapt or Die
item.description: Caley Fretz, Jonny Long, Kit Nicholson, and Chris Marshall-Bell break down the third episode of the third season of Unchained, covering Decathlon-AG2R La Mondiale's evolution and the challenges the team faces trying to get a return on sponsor investment
item.content:encoded: Caley Fretz, Jonny Long, Kit Nicholson, and Chris Marshall-Bell break down the third episode of the third season of Unchained, covering Decathlon-AG2R La Mondiale's evolution and the challenges the team faces trying to get a return on sponsor investment

item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: S3E2: Disruptors
item.itunes:title: S3E2: Disruptors
item.description: Caley Fretz, Jonny Long, and Kit Nicholson talk season three, episode two of Unchained, honing in on the four-rider GC battle at the 2024 Tour de France.

item.title: S3E1: David v Goliath
item.itunes:title: S3E1: David v Goliath
item.description: Caley Fretz, Jonny Long, and Kit Nicholson discuss the opening episode of Tour de France: Unchained season three, which focuses on the build-up to the race and the dynamic of smaller teams taking on big-budget powerhouses.

item.itunes:title: S2E6: Domination
item.description: The Unchained Binge podcast discusses season two, episode six of the show, which offers an inside look in the Jonas Vingegaard's ascent to the top of the Tour standings.

item.title: S2E4: For Gino
item.itunes:title: S2E4: For Gino
item.description: The podcast discusses the fourth episode of Unchained season two, which focuses on the Bahrain team in the aftermath of Gino Mäder's tragic death.

item.itunes:title: S2E3: No Mercy
item.description: Dane Cash, Kit Nicholson, and Caley Fretz discuss the third episode of Unchained, where Jasper Philipsen and Alpecin-Deceuninck take center stage.

item.title: S2E2: The Third Man
item.itunes:title: S2E2: The Third Man
item.description: Kit Nicholson, Dane Cash, and Caley Fretz discuss the second episode of the second season of Unchained, which focuses on Australian GC hopefuls Ben O'Connor and Jai Hindley.

item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: S2E1: No Risk, No Reward
item.itunes:title: S2E1: No Risk, No Reward
item.description:
With the release of season 2 of Netflix's Tour de France: Unchained, the Unchained Binge podcast is back. In this first episode of the year, Kit Nicholson, Jonny Long, and Caley Fretz dive into the first episode, which sets the scene for another season of drama behind the scenes at the Tour.

Escape Collective's podcasts are made possible by our members. Head on over to escapecollective.com/member to support this show and everything else on our podcast network.

Also, we'd love to get your feedback on this show and our other shows. Share your thoughts at escapecollective.com/podcast-survey.
item.content:encoded:
With the release of season 2 of Netflix's Tour de France: Unchained, the Unchained Binge podcast is back. In this first episode of the year, Kit Nicholson, Jonny Long, and Caley Fretz dive into the first episode, which sets the scene for another season of drama behind the scenes at the Tour.

Escape Collective's podcasts are made possible by our members. Head on over to escapecollective.com/member to support this show and everything else on our podcast network.

Also, we'd love to get your feedback on this show and our other shows. Share your thoughts at escapecollective.com/podcast-survey.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary:
With the release of season 2 of Netflix's Tour de France: Unchained, the Unchained Binge podcast is back. In this first episode of the year, Kit Nicholson, Jonny Long, and Caley Fretz dive into the first episode, which sets the scene for another season of drama behind the scenes at the Tour.

Escape Collective's podcasts are made possible by our members. Head on over to escapecollective.com/member to support this show and everything else on our podcast network.

Also, we'd love to get your feedback on this show and our other shows. Share your thoughts at escapecollective.com/podcast-survey.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: 8. Road to Paris
item.itunes:title: 8. Road to Paris
item.description: On the final episode of this season of the Unchained Binge Podcast, we get a bit of the back of the race – the fast finishers trying to make the time cut in the mountains – plus the final fight for the yellow jersey and a sprinters' "world championships" on the Champs-Élysées.
item.content:encoded: On the final episode of this season of the Unchained Binge Podcast, we get a bit of the back of the race – the fast finishers trying to make the time cut in the mountains – plus the final fight for the yellow jersey and a sprinters' "world championships" on the Champs-Élysées.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: On the final episode of this season of the Unchained Binge Podcast, we get a bit of the back of the race – the fast finishers trying to make the time cut in the mountains – plus the final fight for the yellow jersey and a sprinters' "world championships" on the Champs-Élysées.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: 7. Everything for the Podium
item.itunes:title: 7. Everything for the Podium
item.description: In episode 7, we see a lot of Marc Madiot. So much Marc Madiot. We also get a really close look at how old Geraint Thomas really is, as both Gaudu and Thomas battle for one spot on the Tour de France podium.
item.content:encoded: In episode 7, we see a lot of Marc Madiot. So much Marc Madiot. We also get a really close look at how old Geraint Thomas really is, as both Gaudu and Thomas battle for one spot on the Tour de France podium.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: In episode 7, we see a lot of Marc Madiot. So much Marc Madiot. We also get a really close look at how old Geraint Thomas really is, as both Gaudu and Thomas battle for one spot on the Tour de France podium.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: 6. Plan B
item.itunes:title: 6. Plan B
item.description: On this episode of The Unchained Binge Podcast, we watch one of the world's best bike racers be inexplicably bad at bike racing, we learn that one of the world's best sprinters can't remember his shoes or, unfortunately, when there is still a breakaway up the road, and we debate whether there was any real drama inside Jumbo-Visma.
item.content:encoded: On this episode of The Unchained Binge Podcast, we watch one of the world's best bike racers be inexplicably bad at bike racing, we learn that one of the world's best sprinters can't remember his shoes or, unfortunately, when there is still a breakaway up the road, and we debate whether there was any real drama inside Jumbo-Visma.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: On this episode of The Unchained Binge Podcast, we watch one of the world's best bike racers be inexplicably bad at bike racing, we learn that one of the world's best sprinters can't remember his shoes or, unfortunately, when there is still a breakaway up the road, and we debate whether there was any real drama inside Jumbo-Visma.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: 5. Breakneck speed
item.itunes:title: 5. Breakneck speed
item.description: On episode 5, we return the focus to EF and to the Ineos Grenadiers. We get a lesson in descending from Tom Pidcock, we warm up to a rider in the twilight of his career, and we learn that Neilson Powless had a good breakfast.
item.content:encoded: On episode 5, we return the focus to EF and to the Ineos Grenadiers. We get a lesson in descending from Tom Pidcock, we warm up to a rider in the twilight of his career, and we learn that Neilson Powless had a good breakfast.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: On episode 5, we return the focus to EF and to the Ineos Grenadiers. We get a lesson in descending from Tom Pidcock, we warm up to a rider in the twilight of his career, and we learn that Neilson Powless had a good breakfast.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: 4. Attack, Counter Attack
item.itunes:title: 4. Attack, Counter Attack
item.description: Episode 4 offers an inside look at one of the most thrilling Tour stages in recent memory. We see Jumbo-Visma crafting a plan to take on Tadej Pogačar on some of the toughest terrain in the race, and then watch as the action unfolds on the journey from Albertville to the Col du Granon. Also, we discuss the different personalities in the Tour and the ways the show narrows those personalities down, for better or worse. Let's get into it.
item.content:encoded: Episode 4 offers an inside look at one of the most thrilling Tour stages in recent memory. We see Jumbo-Visma crafting a plan to take on Tadej Pogačar on some of the toughest terrain in the race, and then watch as the action unfolds on the journey from Albertville to the Col du Granon. Also, we discuss the different personalities in the Tour and the ways the show narrows those personalities down, for better or worse. Let's get into it.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: Episode 4 offers an inside look at one of the most thrilling Tour stages in recent memory. We see Jumbo-Visma crafting a plan to take on Tadej Pogačar on some of the toughest terrain in the race, and then watch as the action unfolds on the journey from Albertville to the Col du Granon. Also, we discuss the different personalities in the Tour and the ways the show narrows those personalities down, for better or worse. Let's get into it.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: 3. The Weight of a Nation
item.itunes:title: 3. The Weight of a Nation
item.description: In today’s episode, we go to … France. Deep, deep into France. This is the Frenchest of episodes, focused on national hero Thibaut Pinot, eccentric manager Marc Madiot, and a lonely Australian badly in need of some real-life subtitles, Ben O’Connor. Let’s get into it.
item.content:encoded: In today’s episode, we go to … France. Deep, deep into France. This is the Frenchest of episodes, focused on national hero Thibaut Pinot, eccentric manager Marc Madiot, and a lonely Australian badly in need of some real-life subtitles, Ben O’Connor. Let’s get into it.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: In today’s episode, we go to … France. Deep, deep into France. This is the Frenchest of episodes, focused on national hero Thibaut Pinot, eccentric manager Marc Madiot, and a lonely Australian badly in need of some real-life subtitles, Ben O’Connor. Let’s get into it.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: 2. Welcome to Hell
item.itunes:title: 2. Welcome to Hell
item.description: Episode 2 is focused on the team of the Tour, Jumbo-Visma. We get an at-home visit with Wout van Aert, plus a training day with Primoz Roglic, and then a glimpse into the tension between van Aert’s desire and ability to win stages and his role working for Jonas Vingegaard for the overall. Plus Kit's Grand Lord of the Rings Theory of Unchained. Let’s get into it.
item.content:encoded: Episode 2 is focused on the team of the Tour, Jumbo-Visma. We get an at-home visit with Wout van Aert, plus a training day with Primoz Roglic, and then a glimpse into the tension between van Aert’s desire and ability to win stages and his role working for Jonas Vingegaard for the overall. Plus Kit's Grand Lord of the Rings Theory of Unchained. Let’s get into it.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: Episode 2 is focused on the team of the Tour, Jumbo-Visma. We get an at-home visit with Wout van Aert, plus a training day with Primoz Roglic, and then a glimpse into the tension between van Aert’s desire and ability to win stages and his role working for Jonas Vingegaard for the overall. Plus Kit's Grand Lord of the Rings Theory of Unchained. Let’s get into it.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: 1. The Grand Départ
item.itunes:title: 1. The Grand Départ
item.description:
Welcome to the Unchained Binge Podcast, where we'll go deep on all eight episodes of Netflix's new Tour de France docuseries. 


This first episode comes in fast and crashy, focusing on EF's time trial, a farmer's son, and the incredible return of Fabio Jakobsen.
item.content:encoded:
Welcome to the Unchained Binge Podcast, where we'll go deep on all eight episodes of Netflix's new Tour de France docuseries. 


This first episode comes in fast and crashy, focusing on EF's time trial, a farmer's son, and the incredible return of Fabio Jakobsen.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary:
Welcome to the Unchained Binge Podcast, where we'll go deep on all eight episodes of Netflix's new Tour de France docuseries. 


This first episode comes in fast and crashy, focusing on EF's time trial, a farmer's son, and the incredible return of Fabio Jakobsen.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour

item.title: Unchained Binge Pod: The Trailer
item.itunes:title: Unchained Binge Pod: The Trailer
item.description:
This is a podcast dedicated to going deep — really, really deep — into Netflix's Tour de France docuseries Unchained. We’ll break down all eight episodes, each with a podcast episode of its own. We bring a 360-degree view of the Tour de France, with hosts who were at the actual race as reporters, and provide backstory and context beyond the show.


The Binge Pod and Escape Collective are not associated with Netflix in any way. But we feel like we might be friends if we met IRL.
item.content:encoded:
This is a podcast dedicated to going deep — really, really deep — into Netflix's Tour de France docuseries Unchained. We’ll break down all eight episodes, each with a podcast episode of its own. We bring a 360-degree view of the Tour de France, with hosts who were at the actual race as reporters, and provide backstory and context beyond the show.


The Binge Pod and Escape Collective are not associated with Netflix in any way. But we feel like we might be friends if we met IRL.

item.itunes:summary:
This is a podcast dedicated to going deep — really, really deep — into Netflix's Tour de France docuseries Unchained. We’ll break down all eight episodes, each with a podcast episode of its own. We bring a 360-degree view of the Tour de France, with hosts who were at the actual race as reporters, and provide backstory and context beyond the show.


The Binge Pod and Escape Collective are not associated with Netflix in any way. But we feel like we might be friends if we met IRL.
item.itunes:keywords: Pro Cycling, Tour de France, Beginners, Cycling, World Tour
